title: Universal Pot Lid Replacement Knobs, Ydeapi Silicone Pan Lid Holding Handles, Heat Resistant, Non-Slip Handle for Kitchen Cookware Lids and Covers (2 Packs)
description:
About this item
Heat Insulation Replacement Knob: Ydeapi Pot Lid Replacement Knobs are made of premium food grade silicone. Heat-resistant up to 450°F. Stay cool even in extreme heat, which can prevent your hand from injured.
High Quality & Non Slip Holding Handles: Differ from plastic and metal pan lid knobs, Ydeapi Pan Lid Holding Handles are stronger, no metal rusting and won't break or crack. Solid for long-lasting using! Ergonomic and non slip design make it comfortable to grip!
Multi Purpose & Universal Size: The perfect universal lid handle fits most kinds of cookware lids to replace the old or broken ones, such as pot lids, pan lids, slow cooker lids, skillet lids, frying pan lids, saucepan lids, casserole glass lids, wok lids and so on. Suitable for about 7mm mounting hole diameter of lids.
Easy To Install & Clean: 2 sets of pot lid knobs in total: 2 x knobs, 2 x screws, 2 x rubber washers, 2 x stainless steel washers. You can assemble the knob within one minute by yourself. Just attach the Ydeapi knob, rubber washer and steel washer to the pot lid, then tighten the screw on them. Easy to clean by rinsing the knob under running water. Dishwasher safe.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: As above. Good quality and like its versatility.I like this because it fits my cast iron and regular frying pan (which are different sizes) without any alterations. The silicone creates a great seal and it washes easy. It is too tall for my dishwasher bottom rack tho and stops the sprayer from spinning so i hand wash, it's easy nbd. The lid has worked loose a time or two, but it's easy enough to tighten back up. Overall does the job well and has held up to rough and frequent use.This lid works great for our 10" skillet that didn't come with a lid. It adjusts to the size of the pan's or skillet's rim.It fits all my multiple size skillets and Imusa pots, keeps the heat in well and durable.Description says these fit 7" - 12" and they do, quite well. The small lid also fits my 6" cast iron skillet.I had a skillet that lost it lid somehow and I was getting frustrated. I ordered this and it fits perfectly. I am very happy with this purpose.Product fits Lodge glass pan lids. They are identical except for the Lodge logo.I highly recommend! Convenient! Pleasant to the touch. Comfortable.I like the most is that it closes on any size pan as shown, also you can see the item cooking.👍
reviews_1s:
Initially, we thought this was great! However- when the lid arrives, you have to assemble it. It was fine for the first 4-5 washes in the dishwasher (says this ok in the description) but I just pulled it out of washer and the handle broke off. When trying to reattach, it appears the silicone handle rubbed/melted/stripped itself out in either the dishwasher or with the steam of boiling water/dishwasher. We can no longer screw the handle back on. The return window ended 2 weeks ago. So. Great for a few uses and then it falls apart - which earns a 1 star review from this household!I got this 31 days ago and the return window closed yesterday. I thought it was a good product until the 4th use and cleaning and I noticed gray residue on the rubber. It turns out the rubber was melted and could be scraped off with a fingernail. Since it was only used for a large pan, the inner sizes of rubber were not exposed to high heat. On the photos you can see less shiny areas where the rubber scraped off.Do not buy if you want to bake anything in the oven over 450 degrees. The threads in the handle expanded and the handle pulled out of the center bolt. At this high temperature, the handle also emits a very unpleasant, penetrating odor.The package came without screws. Returning.The lid spits, so every time I wash it I get it all dirty. Useless thing. Better to buy a normal iron or glass lid.this seemed to work fine at first and was very adaptable to various pots and pans. One day while frying some fish it got too hot and the top handle melted dropping both the bolt (used for securing the handle) and melted plastic into my food. The burnt melted plastic created a very annoying smell and residue that was hard to remove from my cast iron skillet.

I was outside the return period so I simply threw it away and bought a new lid with a metal handle.Used on several meals until the screw that holds handle to lid melted and fell into the pan!!! Apparently it’s not up to the task of fajitas. It was cheap so you get what you pay for. NOT recommended.This product was delivered without the knobs. Not okscrew holding knob to lid, stripped out after very little use. Obvious design defect.

Would have rated product as zero, but system would not allow. Would never buy this again.This item was delivered without the screws and washers needed to attach them to the pot lid. Utterly useless.
